channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Execution Flow Preview - Fri Jul 03 09:46:57 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: DelveSwap - Fri Jul 03 09:10:14 UTC 2026
item.description:
Override the path to the Delve (dlv) debugger binary on a per-run-configuration basis for Go Build and Go Test configurations. Falls back to the global dlv.path...

item.title: Sidebar Terminal - Fri Jul 03 09:11:26 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: ubwzwd downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.ubwzwd.sidebar-terminal
